raw_consumer_statement:
{$7000.00} Purchase date XX/XX/XXXX Requested return XX/XX/XXXX no follow up for return or information for warranty or return from merchant. 

To whom it may concern : Attached is the documentation for case id : XXXX Item received did not function as advertised. We tried to contact the seller for assistance several times ( via phone and email ) and also to return the product within their 30 day period, with no response from the seller ( email in attachments ). 
Thank you so much for your assistance. 
XXXX XXXX XXXX From : XXXX XXXX Sent : Wednesday, XX/XX/XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX To : XXXX ' XXXX Subject : XXXX * * * Citi Billing Dispute -XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX {$7000.00} XXXX * * URGENT ACTION REQUIRED Dear XXXX XXXX XXXX, I am a Billing Dispute representative at Citi. We are investigating your dispute with XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, posted to your Citibank Credit Card account number ending with XXXX, in the amount of {$7000.00}. 

We are currently processing your dispute claim. In order to assist further, we require some additional information and documentation : We need a Copy of an invoice or contract for this charge. SEE Below Image The date you attempt to return the merchandise to the merchant or attempt to return and provide the date of this attempt along with the merchant response. Date XX/XX/XXXX, No response from Seller for a return NO response. I Did get a response on XXXX with no follow up for return, XXXX  did receive original complaint with request to return. Below also attached in the last email.

Image Image The date you contacted the merchant to request for refund along with their response. Date XX/XX/XXXX, No response from Seller for a return NO response. I Did get a response on XXXX with no follow up for return, XXXX did receive original complaint with request to return. Above also attached in the last email.

A review from the second similar merchant. This document must be a direct comparison to the sales contract provided by the merchant. It must include all items purchased and may not include only simple overviews, such as the services provided by the prior merchant were not done correctly. This merchant opinion needs to be written on their letterhead or include a copy of their business card. Below Image Image Our mailing address is Citi cards, XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX, SD XXXX. Our fax number is XXXX and our e-mail address is XXXX. If you have any questions, you can contact our billing disputes unit at XXXX. 

Once we receive this information, we will continue with our investigation. 
We are looking forward to your response. We appreciate the opportunity to be of service.
